title: ADP (ADP)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on ADP using FY2024 actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what ADP is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-77x5fwy2>
ADP is a mature compounder. An 8% rate accounts for consistent high single-digit revenue growth and modest margin expansion.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate (WACC)
discountRate.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-77x5fwy2>
10Y Treasury: 4.18%. For a defensive company with high recurring revenue, a 9% discount rate provides a solid required return.

terminalGrowth.title: Terminal Growth Rate
terminalGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-77x5fwy2>
Long-term nominal GDP growth is ~3%. ADP operates as a tax on employment; they will grow steadily alongside the overall economy.

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).

faq.question: Why use DCF instead of a P/E multiple?
faq.answer: Westmount Research. "ADP (ADP) Intrinsic Value: A DCF Analysis." westmountfundamentals.com, 2026-03-19.
